mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_job_posting (parent_id, subject_id, subject_name, subject_is_other, title, description, student_gender, grade_code, available_time, teacher_gender_preference, teacher_requirement_detail, child_age, class_mode, city, address, frequency_per_week, budget_min, budget_max, stage_code, education_requirement, publisher_identity, schedule, biz_status, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{subjectId}, #{subjectName}, #{subjectIsOther}, #{title}, #{description}, #{studentGender}, #{gradeCode}, #{availableTime}, #{teacherGenderPreference}, #{teacherRequirementDetail}, #{childAge}, #{classMode}, #{city}, #{address}, #{frequencyPerWeek}, #{budgetMin}, #{budgetMax}, #{stageCode}, #{educationRequirement}, #{publisherIdentity}, #{schedule}, #{bizStatus}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE student_job_posting
subject_id = #{subjectId}, subject_name = #{subjectName}, subject_is_other = #{subjectIsOther},
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, student_gender = #{studentGender}, grade_code = #{gradeCode}, available_time = #{availableTime}, teacher_gender_preference = #{teacherGenderPreference}, teacher_requirement_detail = #{teacherRequirementDetail}, child_age = #{childAge}, class_mode = #{classMode}, city = #{city}, address = #{address}, frequency_per_week = #{frequencyPerWeek}, budget_min = #{budgetMin}, budget_max = #{budgetMax}, stage_code = #{stageCode}, education_requirement = #{educationRequirement}, publisher_identity = #{publisherIdentity}, schedule = #{schedule}, biz_status = #{bizStatus}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, subject_id, subject_name, subject_is_other, title, description, student_gender, grade_code, available_time, teacher_gender_preference, teacher_requirement_detail, child_age, class_mode, city, address, frequency_per_week, budget_min, budget_max, stage_code, education_requirement, publisher_identity, schedule, biz_status, status, create_time, update_time FROM student_job_posting WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, parent_id, subject_id, subject_name, subject_is_other, title, description, student_gender, grade_code, available_time, teacher_gender_preference, teacher_requirement_detail, child_age, class_mode, city, address, frequency_per_week, budget_min, budget_max, stage_code, education_requirement, publisher_identity, schedule, biz_status, status, create_time, update_time FROM student_job_posting WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, parent_id, subject_id, subject_name, subject_is_other, title, description, student_gender, grade_code, available_time, teacher_gender_preference, teacher_requirement_detail, child_age, class_mode, city, address, frequency_per_week, budget_min, budget_max, stage_code, education_requirement, publisher_identity, schedule, biz_status, status, create_time, update_time FROM student_job_posting WHERE status = 1 AND (biz_status IS NULL OR biz_status = 1)
AND subject_id = #{subjectId}
AND subject_is_other = 1
AND ( subject_name = #{subjectName} OR ( subject_name IS NOT NULL AND subject_name != '' AND FIND_IN_SET(#{subjectName}, REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(subject_name, '，', ','), '、', ','), ' ', '')) > 0 ) OR (subject_name IS NULL AND subject_id IN ( SELECT id FROM position_post WHERE enable_status = 1 AND name = #{subjectName} )) OR (subject_id IS NULL AND (subject_name IS NULL OR subject_name = '')) )
AND class_mode = 'online'
AND class_mode = 'offline'
AND class_mode = #{classMode}
AND city = #{city}
AND (stage_code = #{stageCode} OR stage_code IS NULL OR stage_code = '')
AND (frequency_per_week = #{frequencyPerWeek} OR frequency_per_week IS NULL)
AND ( education_requirement = #{educationRequirement} OR education_requirement = 'UNLIMITED' OR education_requirement IS NULL OR education_requirement = '' )
AND (teacher_gender_preference = 'both' OR teacher_gender_preference IS NULL OR teacher_gender_preference = '')
AND ( teacher_gender_preference = #{teacherGenderPreference} OR teacher_gender_preference = 'both' OR teacher_gender_preference IS NULL OR teacher_gender_preference = '' )
AND (budget_max IS NULL OR budget_max >= #{budgetMin})
AND (budget_min IS NULL OR budget_min <= #{budgetMax})
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOCATE(title, #{keyword}) > 0 OR LOCATE(description, #{keyword}) > 0 )
AND id < #{cursor}
ORDER BY budget_max DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize}

SELECT id, parent_id, subject_id, title, description, student_gender, grade_code, available_time, teacher_gender_preference, teacher_requirement_detail, child_age, class_mode, city, address, frequency_per_week, budget_min, budget_max, stage_code, education_requirement, publisher_identity, schedule, biz_status, status, create_time, update_time FROM student_job_posting WHERE status = 1 AND (biz_status IS NULL OR biz_status = 1) AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR LOCATE(title, #{keyword}) > 0) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM student_job_posting WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 AND (biz_status IS NULL OR biz_status = 1)
